parameters.subject: =Pipeline Error: {{ $json.workflow.name }}

_templateNotes.SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS: Replace all placeholder values before activating:
_templateNotes.1_GOOGLE_DRIVE: Replace YOUR_INBOX_FOLDER_ID, YOUR_PROCESSED_FOLDER_ID, YOUR_KINDLE_EXPORTS_FOLDER_ID with your Google Drive folder IDs
_templateNotes.2_NOTION: Replace YOUR_NOTION_DATABASE_ID with your Notion Action Items database ID
_templateNotes.3_EMAIL: Replace YOUR_EMAIL@gmail.com with your notification email
_templateNotes.4_CREDENTIALS: Replace all REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_CREDENTIAL_ID entries with your n8n credential IDs after setting up OAuth and API keys
_templateNotes.5_CLAUDE_API: Set up an HTTP Header Auth credential with name 'x-api-key' and your Anthropic API key as the value
_templateNotes.6_NOTION_API: Set up an HTTP Header Auth credential with name 'Authorization' and value 'Bearer YOUR_NOTION_INTEGRATION_TOKEN'
